summary: Completed testing of Warehouse Stock, Issue, Consumption, Return, and Project Material Ledger features. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: ProjectDetailPage shows 'Материална справка' section with ledger table, action buttons (Отпусни от склад, Отчети разход, Върни в склад), warnings with AlertTriangle icons, and green badges for items with remaining > 0.

issues: Minor: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' warning in dialogs - accessibility improvement suggested (same as iteration 23)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/warehouse-stock correctly returns current stock levels with material_name, unit, qty, value
POST /api/warehouse-issue creates issue transaction, correctly validates insufficient stock (returns 400)
POST /api/warehouse-issue correctly reduces warehouse stock after issue
POST /api/project-consumption records consumption, validates against project remaining (returns 400 if exceeded)
POST /api/warehouse-return returns material to warehouse, validates against project remaining
Material ledger warnings correctly generated: under_purchased, not_consumed, high_remaining
Stock correctly computed: intake + returns - issues
Project remaining correctly computed: issued - consumed - returned
Frontend: 'Материална справка' section displays in ProjectDetailPage with correct table columns
Frontend: 'Отпусни от склад' button opens issue dialog showing available stock
Frontend: 'Отчети разход' button opens consumption dialog pre-filled with items having remaining > 0
Frontend: 'Върни в склад' button opens return dialog pre-filled with items having remaining > 0
Frontend: Warnings displayed above table with AlertTriangle icons in amber color
Frontend: Remaining column shows green badge with '!' for items with remaining_on_project > 0
seed_data_creation: Used existing test materials and project PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da). Created small issue/consumption/return operations during tests to verify workflows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Warehouse and Material Ledger module fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/warehouse-stock (current stock), POST /api/warehouse-issue (issue to project), POST /api/project-consumption (record consumption), POST /api/warehouse-return (return to warehouse), GET /api/project-material-ledger/{project_id} (full ledger with warnings). Stock = intake + returns - issues. Project remaining = issued - consumed - returned. Frontend: ProjectDetailPage integrates ProjectMaterialLedger component showing table with all columns (Поискано/Купено/Отпуснато/Вложено/Върнато/Остатък) and action buttons. Dialogs have data-testid: issue-dialog, consume-dialog, return-dialog. Buttons have data-testid: issue-btn, consume-btn, return-btn. Existing project: PRJ-001 with materials including Гипсова мазилка Knauf, Грундуниверсален, TEST_Posting_Material_1.

GET /api/warehouse-stock.notes: Returns list of items with material_name, unit, qty, value. Only shows items with qty > 0

POST /api/warehouse-issue success.notes: Creates issue transaction with issue_number WI-XXXX, reduces warehouse stock

POST /api/warehouse-issue insufficient s.notes: Returns 400 with Bulgarian error message: 'Недостатъчна наличност'

POST /api/warehouse-issue validation.notes: Returns 400 if project_id missing or lines empty

POST /api/project-consumption success.notes: Records consumption with type='consumption', stores lines with qty_consumed

POST /api/project-consumption validation.notes: Returns 400 with 'Недостатъчно по обекта' if consumption exceeds remaining

POST /api/warehouse-return success.notes: Creates return transaction with type='return', increases warehouse stock

POST /api/warehouse-return validation.notes: Returns 400 if return qty exceeds remaining on project

GET /api/project-material-ledger/{id}.notes: Returns {ledger: [...], warnings: [...]} with all required fields

Material ledger warnings.notes: Generates warnings for under_purchased, not_consumed, high_remaining types

Stock computation.notes: Stock decreases correctly after issue (intake + returns - issues)

Frontend: Material ledger section.notes: 'Материална справка' section with data-testid='material-ledger' displays correctly

Frontend: Issue button and dialog.notes: 'Отпусни от склад' button opens dialog showing available stock

Frontend: Consume button and dialog.notes: 'Отчети разход' button opens dialog pre-filled with items having remaining > 0

Frontend: Return button and dialog.notes: 'Върни в склад' button opens dialog pre-filled with items having remaining > 0

Frontend: Warnings with AlertTriangle ic.notes: Warnings displayed in amber color with AlertTriangle icons above table

Frontend: Green badge for remaining > 0.notes: Remaining column shows emerald green text with badge for items with remaining > 0

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
